mapper.sql: id, file_id, project_id, original_name, server_file_name, file_path, file_size, upload_time, process_status, process_time, output_file_path, error_message, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sas_acrf_upload WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sas_acrf_upload SET file_id = #{fileId}, project_id = #{projectId}, original_name = #{originalName}, server_file_name = #{serverFileName}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_size = #{fileSize}, upload_time = #{uploadTime}, process_status = #{processStatus}, process_time = #{processTime}, output_file_path = #{outputFilePath}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = NOW(), deleted = #{deleted} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sas_acrf_upload WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sas_acrf_upload WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY upload_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE sas_acrf_upload SET process_status = #{processStatus}, process_time = NOW(),
output_file_path = #{outputFilePath},
error_message = #{errorMessage},
update_time = NOW() WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted = 0
